The [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] financed a '''starship''' for [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] to use in his mission to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="SW4" />

{{Ship-stub}}
